description: MCP HTTP server for AI integration

functions.name: start
functions.description: Start the MCP HTTP server on localhost

functions.name: getServerInfo
functions.description: Get current server status, port, and connection file path

functions.name: getAccountAccessConfig
functions.description: Get the current account access control configuration

functions.name: getToolAccessConfig
functions.description: Get the current tool access control configuration

parameters.name: disabledTools
parameters.description: Array of tool names to disable. Empty array means all tools enabled.

functions.name: setAccountAccess
functions.description: Set which accounts the MCP server can access

parameters.name: allowedAccountIds
parameters.description: Array of account IDs to allow. Empty array means all accounts.

functions.name: getBlockSkipReview
functions.description: Get whether skipReview is blocked by user preference

functions.name: setBlockSkipReview
functions.description: Set whether skipReview is blocked by user preference

parameters.name: blockSkipReview
parameters.description: When true, send/reply/forward tools reject skipReview=true and require the review window.

functions.name: getPermissionsConfig
functions.description: Get the fine-grained permission policy (per-tool / per-account / per-folder rules + arg whitelists). Returns { policy } or { error }.

functions.name: setPermissionsConfig
functions.description: Save the fine-grained permission policy. Schema documented in lib/permissions.sys.mjs.

parameters.name: policy
parameters.description: Permission policy document. Validated by permissions.savePolicy(); stored as JSON in PREF_PERMISSIONS. Using 'any' because the experiment-API schema validator rejects nested policy shapes under strict 'object' -- our own validator in lib/permissions.sys.mjs handles structure.

functions.name: clearPermissionsConfig
functions.description: Clear the permission policy (returns to sandbox defaults).
